{{Person | Name=Kota Hoshino | Guid=3040-81345 | Deck=Kota Hoshino is a Japanese musical composer who works for FromSoftware and most famous for doing the Armored Core franchise. | Gender=Male | Birthday=1975-04-23 | Hometown=Tokyo | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises=Franchises/Armored_Core,Franchises/Cyber_Troopers_Virtual_On | Games=Games/Armored_Core_2,Games/Armored_Core_3,Games/Armored_Core_4,Games/Armored_Core_for_Answer,Games/Armored_Core_Last_Raven,Games/Armored_Core_Master_of_Arena,Games/Armored_Core_Nexus,Games/Armored_Core_V,Games/Chromehounds,Games/Frame_Gride,Games/Metal_Wolf_Chaos,Games/Shadow_Tower,Games/Silent_Line_Armored_Core | Locations=Locations/Japan,Locations/Tokyo | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/80630/1736969-khoshino2009.jpg }}

{{Person | Name=Luigi Mangione | Guid=3040-193117 | Deck=Luigi Mangione is an American computer scientist and accused murderer. He worked as a Quality Control intern for User Interface in Civilization VI. | Gender=Male | Birthday=1998-05-06 | Website=https://www.luigimangioneinfo.com/ | LastName=Mangione | Hometown=Towson, Maryland | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Glitch,Concepts/Murder,Concepts/Rebels | Franchises= | Games=Games/Sid_Meiers_Civilization_VI | Locations=Locations/Brooklyn,Locations/Hawaii,Locations/Maryland,Locations/McDonalds,Locations/Pennsylvania,Locations/Prison,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects=Objects/Gun | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3710534-im-81793274.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3710534-im-81793274.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,scale_tiny,scale_super,square_mini,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_small,square_tiny,square_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Luigi Mangione is an American computer scientist and accused murderer. He worked as a Quality Control intern for User Interface in Civilization VI.
